name: script
description: For story discussion and early-stage breakdown
density_rationale: Story discussion needs narrative-beat level coverage, not per-cut detail. Each major story event or location change gets a block.
perspective: State what happens first, then who is present and where. Do not over-load with camera technical info.

segmentation.description: Split blocks on narrative beats — story events, character entrances/exits, location changes. Visual camera style is secondary to story progression.
split_triggers: New story event or narrative beat
Shift in narrative mode (dialogue / action / inner monologue / narration)
merge_bias: Merge continuous dialogue within the same scene and character group
Merge visual style changes that don't affect the story beat
Do NOT merge across story event boundaries
keyframe_priority: Frame showing the key story action or event
Frame showing character grouping and spatial relationships
For dialogue blocks, frame showing the primary speaker

fill_guidance: **scene**: scene name or setup (use `temp: xxx` if unconfirmed)
**event**: what happens — focus on story, not camera
